title: Kio Economy
description: Adds some coins into the game with official and unofficial minting
body: This mod adds coins into the game to be used as a currency. This coin mods aims at being fun and doesn't take itself too seriously. This coin mod also has official and unofficial minting. This means that admins can enforce an official currency that can not be crafted without operator permissions. This also means that players can craft a counterfeit currency.
